subcodes.first_line: This is what was revealed concerning the Most Exalted One, Who suffered martyrdom in the Land of Ṭá, a martyrdom which bewildered the Concourse on High [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا ما نزل للعلی الأعلی الذی استشهد فی ارض الطآء شهادة تحیرت منها الملأ الأعلی
subcodes.subjects: @the Bab; the Primal Point; station and claims of the Bab, @martyrs and martyrdom
